    The Third Prince of the Fallen Kingdom has Regressed
    9.5/ 10 (2)
    Read Now
    Authors Updating
    Status OnGoing
    Type Manhwa
    Bookmarks 867
    Created 06/18/2025 02:56
    Update 1d ago

    The Third Prince of the Fallen Kingdom has Regressed

    Other name: 멸망한 왕국의 3왕자가 회귀했다

    Action Adventure Fantasy Long Strip
    Start Reading Read newest

    Description

    From the stuido that brought you Moon-Shadow Sword Emperor and The Legendary Hero is an Academy Honors Student.] Yuri, the unruly third prince of the fallen Briol Kingdom. After meeting his end while wandering in guilt, he ended up regressing to the spring of his 13th year, before the Empire's invasion began! "Briols do not abandon honor, even in death." One harrowing regret is enough. The kingdom shall be saved from ruin!
